homePage.label: // home
homePage.ctaCopy: Plugins, server setups, and web work — built fast, polished, and production-ready.

aboutPage.label: // about
aboutPage.title: Studio-first craft for modern Minecraft products.
aboutPage.copy: ZCraft Studios builds server systems, plugins, and web experiences for teams, communities, and creators. We combine design, performance, and polished delivery for commercial-grade releases.

values.title: Production-ready delivery
values.desc: We ship polished, well-tested work that is built to run in real server environments.

values.title: Clear communication
values.desc: Every request is handled with transparent scope, timeline, and follow-up.

values.title: Performance-first design
values.desc: Our plugins, sites, and configurations are optimized for speed and reliability.

resourcesPage.label: // resources
resourcesPage.title: Tools, configs, and kits built for real servers.
resourcesPage.copy: A studio-grade toolkit for server operators and plugin teams. Every download is designed to ship fast and scale cleanly.

featured.title: Studio showcase
featured.description: Featured releases, commissions, and portfolio highlights built for performance and polish.

commissions.title: Plugin Development
commissions.desc: Custom server plugins, bots, and mod support.

commissions.title: Web Design
commissions.desc: Landing pages, resource hubs, and studio sites.

donate.label: // support
donate.title: Support ZCraft Studios
donate.copy: Help us keep building premium Minecraft resources, plugins, and modern web experiences.
donate.heroCopy: Every donation directly funds development, infrastructure, and new features. No middlemen, pure impact.

form.title: Make a Donation
form.copy: Choose your amount and complete securely through PayPal

benefits.title: Confirmation
benefits.copy: You'll see a thank you page

benefits.title: Impact
benefits.copy: Your support fuels our next release

thankyou.label: // gratitude
thankyou.title: Thank You
thankyou.copy: Thank you for your interest in supporting us.
thankyou.copySuccess: Your generosity keeps us building amazing things.
thankyou.impact: Your donation directly supports our mission to deliver premium Minecraft resources and tools to the community.

request.label: // commission
request.title: Request a Custom Service
request.copy: Tell us what you need. We'll respond within 24 hours with a quote and timeline.

fields.label: Discord Username
fields.hint: So we can reach you back

fields.label: Project Description
fields.placeholder: What do you need built? Be as detailed as possible...

form.statusEmpty: Please fill in your Discord identifier, email, budget, and description.
form.statusSuccess: Request submitted. We will review it and follow up shortly.
form.statusError: Could not send the request right now. Please contact us directly.

nextSteps: We review every request and confirm scope within 24 hours.
You receive a pricing estimate, timeline, and implementation details.
We start once the project is approved and proceed with weekly updates.

teamPage.label: // team
teamPage.title: Built by a small but experienced studio crew.
teamPage.copy: Every release is reviewed, supported, and polished for real server environments. Meet the people who ship the experience.

notFound.title: route not found
notFound.copy: The page you tried to load doesn't exist on {siteName}.

contact.title: let's build something premium.
contact.copy: Open for plugin commissions, server setups, and modern web work. Discord is the fastest way to reach me — replies usually within a few hours.

help.title: Need a custom plugin?
help.desc: Share your server version, desired features, and any existing plugins so we can estimate compatibility quickly.

help.title: Troubleshooting existing setups
help.desc: If a server issue is blocking you, provide logs, configs, and what you already tried. We can help isolate the fix.

help.title: Planning a new project
help.desc: We can scope builds for websites, Discord bots, proxy auth, and server automation with a clear launch plan.

team.name: Zain Abusal
team.bio: Passionate Minecraft developer with 2+ years of experience building websites and server systems. Focused on performance and user experience.
